description: Full LiteRaceSegNet reference: detail branch + boundary gate + boundary-logit fusion + LiteASPP context.
Keep boundary prediction but disable boundary-guided gating.
Predict boundary logit without concatenating it into the fusion module.
Remove the high-resolution detail branch contribution.
Replace LiteASPP context aggregation with DSConv context module.
Backbone-capacity ablation proxy: reduce base/context channels instead of claiming literal backbone removal.
